_meta.description: Amalfi Resort Chatbot - Menu Response Templates
_meta.instructions: Edit wording here freely. Placeholders pull live data from the Hub knowledge API at runtime. Quick reply labels should match handler keywords in webhooks.py.

main_menu.greeting_template:
Mabuhay! Welcome to *Amalfi Resort*.

Hi {first_name}! How can we help you today?

Tap a menu option below or type MENU anytime.
main_menu.greeting_no_name:
Mabuhay! Welcome to *Amalfi Resort*.

How can we help you today?

Tap a menu option below or type MENU anytime.

stay_options.template:
*Stay Options*

Browse our overnight accommodations, room rates, and booking options.

If you already know your dates, the fastest path is Book Now. If you want help choosing a setup, guest services can assist.

day_tour_and_camping.template:
*Day Tour & Camping*

This section covers day tour details and tent pitching options.

Choose a submenu below to view rates, schedules, and camping details.

rentals_and_add_ons.template:
*Rentals & Add-ons*

This section covers kitchen rental, resort amenities, and add-on services that can complete your stay.

resort_info.template:
*Amalfi Resort*

{about_description}

Location: {location}

Check-in: 1PM | Check-out: 11AM
No corkage fee on food and drinks.

Highlights:
- Beachfront stay in Zambales
- Family-friendly accommodations
- 24/7 CCTV
- WiFi available

rooms_and_rates.intro_message:
*Our Accommodations*
Here are our available sanctuary spaces:

amenities.template:
*Resort Amenities*

Facilities:
{facilities_list}

Add-ons:
{addons_list}

ATV Adventure:
- 30 minutes: PHP 800
- 1 hour: PHP 1,500

rules_and_policies.template:
*Rules & Policies*

Downpayment: {downpayment_percent}% required to confirm booking

Check-in: 1PM | Check-out: 11AM
Room Extension: PHP 500/hr, subject to availability

Cancellation & Rebooking:
{cancellation_policy}

Kids: {free_kids_per_villa} children aged 5 and below are free per Villa
Pets: 1 small dog allowed except Owner's Villa. Must be potty trained and wearing a diaper.
Quiet hours after 11PM
No smoking indoors

payment_inquiry.template:
*Payment Inquiry*

For payment concerns, please send your booking reference, name, amount paid, payment date/time, and proof of payment screenshot if available.

Our guest services team will review and follow up as soon as possible.

directions.template:
*Amalfi Resort Location*

{location}

From Manila: around 3-4 hours via NLEX, SCTEX, Subic, then San Felipe.
Landmark: Ask locals for Amalfi Resort, Liwliwa.

human_handoff.template:
Hang tight. We have notified our guest services team. A real human from Amalfi Resort will assist you as soon as possible.

In the meantime, type MENU to browse rooms, rates, amenities, and booking details.

book_now.message:
Ready to book your Amalfi Resort stay?
Choose your unit, pick your dates, and secure your reservation on our booking site.

session_limit_reached.followup_message: Tap MENU anytime to browse rooms, rates, amenities, and more.

out_of_scope.template: I can help with Amalfi Resort rooms, rates, availability, day tours, amenities, policies, directions, payments, and booking questions. Please type MENU to browse our resort options.

receipt_acknowledgement.template: Thanks for sending your receipt. Our team will verify your payment and update your booking status within 24 hours.
receipt_acknowledgement.template_tagalog: Salamat sa pag-send ng inyong receipt. I-ve-verify ng aming team ang payment at i-update ang booking status sa loob ng 24 oras.
receipt_acknowledgement.template_taglish: Salamat for sending your receipt. I-verify ng team namin ang payment and we will update your booking status within 24 hours.
